mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` ( memberUid, orderPrice, orderDiscount, couponIssueId, orderTotal, usedPoints, receiver, phone, zipCode, addr1, addr2, payMethod, status, orderNote, createdAt ) VALUES ( #{memberUid}, #{orderPrice}, #{orderDiscount}, #{couponIssueId}, #{orderTotal}, #{usedPoints}, #{receiver}, #{phone}, #{zipCode}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{payMethod}, #{status}, #{orderNote}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO order_item (orderNo, prodVariantId, count, price, total, shippingFee, sellerUid, itemStatus) VALUES
( #{item.orderNo}, #{item.prodVariantId}, #{item.count}, #{item.price}, #{item.total}, #{item.shippingFee}, #{item.sellerUid}, #{item.itemStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT o.orderNo, o.memberUid, o.orderPrice, o.orderDiscount, o.couponIssueId, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(oi.shippingFee) FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.orderNo = o.orderNo ), 0) AS shippingFee, o.usedPoints, o.orderTotal, o.receiver, o.phone, o.zipCode, o.addr1, o.addr2, o.payMethod, o.status, o.orderNote, o.createdAt FROM `order` o WHERE o.orderNo = #{orderNo}
SELECT orderItemNo, orderNo, prodVariantId, count, price, total, shippingFee, sellerUid, itemStatus FROM `order_item` WHERE orderNo = #{orderNo}

SELECT o.*, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(oi.shippingFee) FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.orderNo = o.orderNo ), 0) AS shippingFee, m.name AS memberName, (SELECT SUM(oi.count) FROM `order_item` oi WHERE oi.orderNo = o.orderNo) AS totalCount FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN `member` m ON o.memberUid = m.uid
ORDER BY o.orderNo DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN `member` m ON o.memberUid = m.uid

SELECT oi.orderItemNo, oi.orderNo, oi.prodVariantId, pv.prodNo, p.prodName, p.thumb1FileId, oi.sellerUid, s.companyName AS sellerName, oi.count, p.price AS originalPrice, p.discount AS discountRate, GREATEST((p.price * oi.count) - oi.total, 0) AS discountAmount, oi.price, oi.total, oi.shippingFee, oi.itemStatus, sh.shipmentNo, sh.courierName, sh.trackingNo, sh.status AS shipmentStatus, o.createdAt FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = oi.orderNo JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.id = oi.prodVariantId JOIN product p ON p.prodNo = pv.prodNo LEFT JOIN seller s ON s.uid = oi.sellerUid LEFT JOIN shipment_item si ON si.orderItemNo = oi.orderItemNo LEFT JOIN shipment sh ON sh.shipmentNo = si.shipmentNo WHERE oi.orderNo = #{orderNo} ORDER BY oi.orderItemNo ASC

SELECT oi.orderItemNo, oi.orderNo, oi.prodVariantId, pv.prodNo, p.prodName, p.thumb1FileId, oi.sellerUid, s.companyName AS sellerName, oi.count, p.price AS originalPrice, p.discount AS discountRate, GREATEST((p.price * oi.count) - oi.total, 0) AS discountAmount, oi.price, oi.total, oi.shippingFee, oi.itemStatus, sh.shipmentNo, sh.courierName, sh.trackingNo, sh.status AS shipmentStatus, o.createdAt FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = oi.orderNo JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.id = oi.prodVariantId JOIN product p ON p.prodNo = pv.prodNo LEFT JOIN seller s ON s.uid = oi.sellerUid LEFT JOIN shipment_item si ON si.orderItemNo = oi.orderItemNo LEFT JOIN shipment sh ON sh.shipmentNo = si.shipmentNo WHERE oi.orderNo = #{orderNo} AND si.shipmentItemNo IS NULL AND oi.itemStatus IN ('PAID', 'READY') ORDER BY oi.sellerUid ASC, oi.orderItemNo ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO shipment_item (shipmentNo, orderItemNo, quantity) VALUES
(#{item.shipmentNo}, #{item.orderItemNo}, #{item.quantity})
mapper.select:
SELECT sh.shipmentNo, oi.orderItemNo, sh.orderNo, oi.sellerUid, s.companyName AS sellerName, pv.prodNo, p.prodName, p.thumb1FileId, si.quantity, oi.total AS itemTotal, oi.shippingFee, oi.itemStatus, o.receiver, o.phone, CONCAT('[', o.zipCode, '] ', o.addr1, ' ', COALESCE(o.addr2, '')) AS address, sh.courierName, sh.trackingNo, sh.status, sh.shippedAt, sh.createdAt, si.quantity AS itemCount FROM shipment sh JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = sh.orderNo JOIN shipment_item si ON si.shipmentNo = sh.shipmentNo JOIN order_item oi ON oi.orderItemNo = si.orderItemNo JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.id = oi.prodVariantId JOIN product p ON p.prodNo = pv.prodNo LEFT JOIN seller s ON s.uid = oi.sellerUid
ORDER BY sh.shipmentNo DESC, oi.orderItemNo ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shipment sh JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = sh.orderNo JOIN shipment_item si ON si.shipmentNo = sh.shipmentNo JOIN order_item oi ON oi.orderItemNo = si.orderItemNo JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.id = oi.prodVariantId JOIN product p ON p.prodNo = pv.prodNo LEFT JOIN seller s ON s.uid = oi.sellerUid

SELECT sh.shipmentNo, sh.orderNo, sh.sellerUid, s.companyName AS sellerName, o.receiver, o.phone, CONCAT('[', o.zipCode, '] ', o.addr1, ' ', COALESCE(o.addr2, '')) AS address, sh.courierName, sh.trackingNo, sh.status, sh.shippedAt, sh.createdAt, COALESCE(SUM(si.quantity), 0) AS itemCount FROM shipment sh JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = sh.orderNo LEFT JOIN seller s ON s.uid = sh.sellerUid LEFT JOIN shipment_item si ON si.shipmentNo = sh.shipmentNo WHERE sh.shipmentNo = #{shipmentNo} GROUP BY sh.shipmentNo, sh.orderNo, sh.sellerUid, s.companyName, o.receiver, o.phone, o.zipCode, o.addr1, o.addr2, sh.courierName, sh.trackingNo, sh.status, sh.shippedAt, sh.createdAt

SELECT oi.orderItemNo, oi.orderNo, oi.prodVariantId, pv.prodNo, p.prodName, p.thumb1FileId, oi.sellerUid, s.companyName AS sellerName, si.quantity AS count, p.price AS originalPrice, p.discount AS discountRate, GREATEST((p.price * si.quantity) - (oi.price * si.quantity), 0) AS discountAmount, oi.price, oi.total, oi.shippingFee, oi.itemStatus, sh.shipmentNo, sh.courierName, sh.trackingNo, sh.status AS shipmentStatus, o.createdAt FROM shipment_item si JOIN shipment sh ON sh.shipmentNo = si.shipmentNo JOIN order_item oi ON oi.orderItemNo = si.orderItemNo JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = oi.orderNo JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.id = oi.prodVariantId JOIN product p ON p.prodNo = pv.prodNo LEFT JOIN seller s ON s.uid = oi.sellerUid WHERE si.shipmentNo = #{shipmentNo} ORDER BY oi.orderItemNo ASC
